---
title: "builder.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/builder.py"
loc: 24
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.55
style_score: 3.63
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 6.99
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignBuilder, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignBuilder and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 0 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.instruction_loader](file://src.core.engine.instruction_loader)
- [src.core.engine.memory_db](file://src.core.engine.memory_db)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `SovereignBuilder`
- `__init__`
- `build_vector_engine`
